name: write_manifest
description: Create or update the release manifest (.release-flags/pr-<N>.json). Pass only the fields you own — they are MERGED into the existing file (agent fields: flagKey, scope, releasePlan.*). The human-editable releaseIntent block is auto-initialized on first write and PRESERVED on later writes (you cannot overwrite it). The file is validated, written as schema 1.1, and committed to the PR branch automatically — do not also edit it with write_file/edit_file.
